prediction.reasoning: Based on historical volatility analysis of GILD, the stock typically exhibits moderate volatility with annualized volatility around 25-30%. For a 22-day period, this translates to approximately 3.8% standard deviation. The point estimate assumes a random walk model with no drift, while confidence intervals are constructed using normal distribution assumptions with increasing widths for higher confidence levels. GILD as a large-cap biotech stock tends to have lower volatility than small-cap stocks but higher than broad market indices.
